backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, coin balances, deposit requests, tournament management, match tracking, and admin operations with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: Free Fire battle-themed backgrounds, authentic Free Fire color scheme/UI patterns, and prominent display of owner name 'NIRANJAN'.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, and hooks describing Free Fire battle-themed UI, tournament management, wallet deposits, admin panels, and user authentication flows.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes for background, foreground, cards, borders, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title 'FF PAYALUGA', root div for React mounting, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with eight routes (home, login, dashboard, wallet, tournament, admin, tournament-admin, deposit-admin), QueryClient, ThemeProvider, InternetIdentity provider, and ProfileSetupModal integration.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Access denied screen component displaying shield alert icon and message for non-admin users attempting to access admin panel, with navigation back to dashboard.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPassw: A password-protected guard component that wraps admin content, requiring 'admin123' password for access with a gaming-themed UI featuring lock icons and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/DepositPas: A session-based password guard for the deposit management portal that stores authentication in sessionStorage and uses 'admin123' as the password with a cyan-themed gaming UI.
frontend/src/components/admin/DepositVer: Displays a table of pending deposit requests with approve/reject actions, fetching data via useGetPendingDepositRequests and handling actions through useApproveDeposit and useRejectDeposit hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/DirectDepo: Admin interface with tabs for directly depositing coins to users (with search/select functionality) and viewing transaction history, using useAdminDirectDeposit and related query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/JoinReques: Displays a searchable table of tournament join requests showing user details, Free Fire UID, WhatsApp number, entry fee, and join timestamp using useGetAllTournamentJoinRequests hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/MatchManag: Manages tournament matches with create/edit dialogs and searchable table view, allowing admins to set and update match details (player UID, WhatsApp, match time) using useSetMatch and useUpdateMatch hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/Tournament: Admin panel for configuring tournament settings including status toggle, entry fee, match count, and match time, displaying current settings and providing update forms for each configuration option.
Password-protected guard component for tournament admin portal that checks session storage for authentication and displays a login form with hardcoded password 'admin123'.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserManage: Admin component that displays a searchable table of all registered users with their ID, name, and email using the useGetAllUsers hook.
frontend/src/components/common/GamingBut: Reusable button component with gaming-themed styling, supporting three variants (primary, secondary, danger) and three sizes (sm, md, lg) with gradient backgrounds and glow effects.
frontend/src/components/common/GamingCar: Card container component with gaming-themed styling, optional glow effects (orange, cyan, or none), and decorative corner accents.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper component that includes navigation, background overlay, main content area, and footer with URL sharing functionality and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: Navigation bar component with responsive mobile menu, authentication controls via Internet Identity, and links to home, dashboard, wallet, tournament, and admin sections with pending deposit badge.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup collecting name and email with Free Fire gaming theme and orange accents, using useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, balances, deposits, tournaments, matches, and admin operations using the actor from useActor. Includes hooks for admin verification, deposit requests, tournament joins, and match management with toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for a Free Fire gaming theme including dark mode colors, battle-themed overlays, and custom styling for gaming UI elements with orange/cyan accent colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with authentication guard, password protection, and tabbed interface for managing users, deposits, tournaments, matches, and direct deposits. Shows pending deposit notifications and requires admin privileges.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: User dashboard page displaying profile information, wallet balance, and tournament status with navigation to wallet and tournament pages. Requires authentication and shows loading states.
frontend/src/pages/DepositAdminPage.tsx: Specialized admin page for coin deposit management with password protection, featuring tabs for direct deposits and user management. Requires admin authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with hero section featuring Free Fire branding, call-to-action buttons for authenticated/unauthenticated users, and feature cards highlighting tournaments, deposits, security, and leaderboards.
frontend/src/pages/LoginRegister.tsx: Login page component that handles Internet Identity authentication and automatically redirects authenticated users to the dashboard. Displays welcome message, login button, and feature list for new users.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentAdminPage.t: Admin portal page with password protection that provides tabbed interface for managing tournament matches, join requests, and configuration. Includes admin role verification and access control.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentPage.tsx: Tournament page where authenticated users can view tournament status (open/closed), check entry fees and balance, and submit join requests with Free Fire UID and WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/pages/WalletDeposit.tsx: Wallet management page displaying user balance and deposit form (₹10-₹100 range) with UPI payment instructions. Includes actor availability checks and clipboard functionality for UPI ID.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and parameter cleanup functions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (including FF-branded colors using OKLCH), gaming-themed fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron), custom shadows, animations, and responsive container settings.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting FF PAYALUGA, a Free Fire esports tournament web app with user registration, UPI-based deposits, wallet system, and admin panels for deposit verification and tournament management. Currently has an 'ACTOR NOT AVAILABLE' error during deposit submission that needs fixing.
